Process contaminant accumulation data

Source: R/10-data-processing.R
process_contaminant_data.Rd

Interpolates contaminant time series from bio_obj$contaminant_data to daily values aligned with target_days. Returns NULL when no contaminant data is present.

Expected structure of bio_obj$contaminant_data:

CONTEQ

Integer 1, 2 or 3 (bioaccumulation model)

initial_concentration

Initial predator concentration (ug/g)

prey_concentrations

data.frame Day + one column per prey (ug/g)

transfer_efficiency

data.frame Day + one per prey — used by CONTEQ 1

assimilation_efficiency

data.frame Day + one per prey — used by CONTEQ 2, 3

gill_efficiency, fish_water_partition, water_concentration, dissolved_fraction, do_saturation

Scalars required by CONTEQ 3

Usage

process_contaminant_data(bio_obj, target_days, prey_names)

Arguments

bio_obj

Bioenergetic object

target_days

Target simulation days

prey_names

Character vector of prey names

Value

Named list with processed contaminant parameters, or NULL

On this page
